title: 8nm Chips Meet 10K-Qubit Threat - TCR 04/03/26
description:
ASML patterned 8-nanometer chip features in a single lithographic step while two independent teams found quantum computers could crack current encryption with just 10,000 qubits - and Google released its most capable open model under a fully permissive Apache 2.0 license for the first time.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-3-2026/

ASML's high-numerical-aperture EUV lithography system etched features smaller than a DNA strand onto silicon, tripling transistor density per chip generation and directly addressing the computational demands of the intelligence era. The same day, Oratomic (a Caltech spinoff) and a separate Google white paper independently concluded that cracking P-256 elliptic curve cryptography could require as few as 10,000 qubits rather than millions, compressing the timeline for cryptographic vulnerability to potentially before 2030. Google released Gemma 4 under Apache 2.0, removing all proprietary restrictions from its most capable open model family for the first time and making the 31B Dense model freely modifiable and commercially deployable by anyone. Cursor launched Cursor 3, an agent-first coding workspace where developers manage autonomous AI agents rather than write code, while Django co-creator Simon Willison described the cognitive exhaustion of managing parallel agent workflows on Lenny's Podcast. A Karolinska Institutet trial published in Nature Medicine showed a single injection of OTOF gene therapy restored hearing in all ten patients with congenital deafness - including teenagers and a 24-year-old adult - with the team already extending the approach to more common deafness genes. Arevon began construction of a 1-gigawatt-hour urban battery next to San Francisco's Cow Palace, the largest battery facility sited within a major U.S. city, and the Trump administration filed its appeal of the injunction blocking the Pentagon's supply-chain designation against Anthropic, sending the case to the Ninth Circuit.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-3-2026/

Additional Reading:
